description: Manage Zencoder/Zenflow projects, tasks, plans, workflows, and automations. Delegate complex coding problems to Zenflow's AI agents and track their progress.

auth.instructions: Generate a personal access token at auth.zencoder.ai (Administration > Settings > Personal Tokens). Copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately — the secret is only shown once.

required_secrets.name: zencoder_client_id
required_secrets.prompt: Zencoder Client ID (from auth.zencoder.ai > Administration > Settings > Personal Tokens)

required_secrets.name: zencoder_client_secret
required_secrets.prompt: Zencoder Client Secret (shown once at token creation)
